title: hortensia kawagoeana var. grosseserrata
intro: Hortensia kawagoeana var. grosseserrata, also known as the Kawagoe hortensia, is a rare and unique variety of hydrangea plant native to Japan. It is known for its serrated leaves and distinctive white flowers, which are said to have medicinal properties. The Kawagoe hortensia is used in traditional herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, inflammation, and digestive problems, due to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. Herbal preparations of the plant are often consumed as a tea or used in infusions to relieve symptoms and promote overall well-being.
